name: Rouleau-Marteau
description: Deux bras mécaniques géants terminés par des masses hydrauliques. Il écrase, broie et aplati tout sur son passage. Le bulldozer des Ferrailleurs, version cauchemar.
prompt: Sci-fi scrap-punk heavy mechanical vehicle with two giant hydraulic hammer arms, bulldozer-like body made from welded station modules, massive blunt force arms raised mid-swing, rust and hydraulic fluid leaks, devastation in its wake, highly detailed
